log.description: 日志内容（仅 kind="tool_log" 时有值）

stream.description: 日志来源流: "stdout" | "stderr"（仅 kind="tool_log" 时有值）

Usage.description: Usage statistics for a chat turn, re-exported from nova-core. This mirrors `crate::provider::types::Usage` to avoid adding a dependency on nova-core.

id.description: 请求响应模式下的消息 ID，事件推送时为 None
